title: Peppery Rye-Salt Dutch Cheese Supper
description: A savory, slow-cooked one-pot dish featuring a blend of rye cheese and spices. This Ayurvedic-friendly meal is perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: Fine sea salt
ingredients.notes: Use a salt block to cook and serve.

instructions: In a preheated salt block over medium heat, melt the unsalted butter. Add the rye flour and whisk until a smooth paste forms.
Gradually add the water, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the rye cheese, coarse black pepper, and ground cloves. Stir until the cheese is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Continue cooking for an additional 20 minutes, stirring frequently, until the cheese has thickened and a crust has formed on the surface.
Use a spatula to scoop and serve the Peppery Rye-Salt Dutch Cheese Supper hot, garnished with additional coarse black pepper if desired.
